page_content:
Corequisite: NFSC456.

Restriction: Senior standing or higher; and must be in Nutrition and Food Science: Dietetics program.

NFSC498 Selected Topics (1-3 Credits)

Selected current aspects of food.

Restriction: Permission of AGNR-Nutrition and Food Science department. Repeatable to: 6 credits if content differs.

NFSC605 Food-Related Behavior of the Individual (3 Credits) Examination of the factors that influence food-related behavior and of the research methods used.
